Title: How might we give every new student one consistent path to accept and enrol?
Description: A single, clear flow to accept offers and complete core administrative enrolment centrally.

Title: How might we let a student plan their whole degree without hopping between hub and faculty?
Description: A hub course-planning gateway linking every faculty's sample plans — with faculties linking the planner, not re-hosting it — lets a student plan in one flow.

Title: How might we make sure enrolment is explained once, in one place?
Description: Declare the hub the single source of truth for the transactional spine: enrolment mechanics. Faculties link, never restate.

Title: How might we ensure students see the definitive hub rules for load and timetabling?
Description: Each faculty should expose one consistent 'Enrolment, results & admin' landing page whose entire job is to link to the hub's transactional pages and surface the faculty's genuine local exceptions.
